domProps.name: inputMode
domProps.description: Hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents

domProps.name: is
domProps.description: Specify that a standard HTML element should behave like a defined custom built-in element

ariaProps.name: aria-activedescendant
ariaProps.description: Identifies the currently active element when DOM focus is on a composite widget, textbox, group, or application.

ariaProps.name: aria-atomic
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether assistive technologies will present all, or only parts of, the changed region based on the change notifications defined by the aria-relevant attribute.

ariaProps.name: aria-autocomplete
ariaProps.description:
Indicates whether inputting text could trigger display of one or more predictions of the user's intended value for an input and specifies how predictions would be
presented if they are made.

ariaProps.name: aria-braillelabel
ariaProps.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element, which is intended to be converted into Braille.

ariaProps.name: aria-brailleroledescription
ariaProps.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized abbreviated description for the role of an element, which is intended to be converted into Braille.

ariaProps.name: aria-checked
ariaProps.description: Indicates the current "checked" state of checkboxes, radio buttons, and other widgets.

ariaProps.name: aria-colcount
ariaProps.description: Defines the total number of columns in a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-colindex
ariaProps.description: Defines an element's column index or position with respect to the total number of columns within a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-colindextext
ariaProps.description: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-colindex.

ariaProps.name: aria-colspan
ariaProps.description: Defines the number of columns spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-controls
ariaProps.description: Identifies the element (or elements) whose contents or presence are controlled by the current element.

ariaProps.name: aria-current
ariaProps.description: Indicates the element that represents the current item within a container or set of related elements.

ariaProps.name: aria-describedby
ariaProps.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.

ariaProps.name: aria-description
ariaProps.description: Defines a string value that describes or annotates the current element.

ariaProps.name: aria-details
ariaProps.description: Identifies the element that provides a detailed, extended description for the object.

ariaProps.name: aria-disabled
ariaProps.description: Indicates that the element is perceivable but disabled, so it is not editable or otherwise operable.

ariaProps.name: aria-dropeffect
ariaProps.description: Indicates what functions can be performed when a dragged object is released on the drop target.

ariaProps.name: aria-errormessage
ariaProps.description: Identifies the element that provides an error message for the object.

ariaProps.name: aria-expanded
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether the element, or another grouping element it controls, is currently expanded or collapsed.

ariaProps.name: aria-flowto
ariaProps.description:
Identifies the next element (or elements) in an alternate reading order of content which, at the user's discretion,
allows assistive technology to override the general default of reading in document source order.

ariaProps.name: aria-grabbed
ariaProps.description: Indicates an element's "grabbed" state in a drag-and-drop operation.

ariaProps.name: aria-haspopup
ariaProps.description: Indicates the availability and type of interactive popup element, such as menu or dialog, that can be triggered by an element.

ariaProps.name: aria-hidden
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether the element is exposed to an accessibility API.

ariaProps.name: aria-invalid
ariaProps.description: Indicates the entered value does not conform to the format expected by the application.

ariaProps.name: aria-keyshortcuts
ariaProps.description: Indicates keyboard shortcuts that an author has implemented to activate or give focus to an element.

ariaProps.name: aria-label
ariaProps.description: Defines a string value that labels the current element.

ariaProps.name: aria-labelledby
ariaProps.description: Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.

ariaProps.name: aria-level
ariaProps.description: Defines the hierarchical level of an element within a structure.

ariaProps.name: aria-live
ariaProps.description: Indicates that an element will be updated, and describes the types of updates the user agents, assistive technologies, and user can expect from the live region.

ariaProps.name: aria-modal
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether an element is modal when displayed.

ariaProps.name: aria-multiline
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether a text box accepts multiple lines of input or only a single line.

ariaProps.name: aria-multiselectable
ariaProps.description: Indicates that the user may select more than one item from the current selectable descendants.

ariaProps.name: aria-orientation
ariaProps.description: Indicates whether the element's orientation is horizontal, vertical, or unknown/ambiguous.

ariaProps.name: aria-owns
ariaProps.description:
Identifies an element (or elements) in order to define a visual, functional, or contextual parent/child relationship
between DOM elements where the DOM hierarchy cannot be used to represent the relationship.

ariaProps.name: aria-placeholder
ariaProps.description:
Defines a short hint (a word or short phrase) intended to aid the user with data entry when the control has no value.
A hint could be a sample value or a brief description of the expected format.

ariaProps.name: aria-posinset
ariaProps.description: Defines an element's number or position in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

ariaProps.name: aria-pressed
ariaProps.description: Indicates the current "pressed" state of toggle buttons.

ariaProps.name: aria-readonly
ariaProps.description: Indicates that the element is not editable, but is otherwise operable.

ariaProps.name: aria-relevant
ariaProps.type: "text" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "all" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals" | undefined
ariaProps.description: Indicates what notifications the user agent will trigger when the accessibility tree within a live region is modified.

ariaProps.name: aria-required
ariaProps.description: Indicates that user input is required on the element before a form may be submitted.

ariaProps.name: aria-roledescription
ariaProps.description: Defines a human-readable, author-localized description for the role of an element.

ariaProps.name: aria-rowcount
ariaProps.description: Defines the total number of rows in a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-rowindex
ariaProps.description: Defines an element's row index or position with respect to the total number of rows within a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-rowindextext
ariaProps.description: Defines a human readable text alternative of aria-rowindex.

ariaProps.name: aria-rowspan
ariaProps.description: Defines the number of rows spanned by a cell or gridcell within a table, grid, or treegrid.

ariaProps.name: aria-selected
ariaProps.description: Indicates the current "selected" state of various widgets.

ariaProps.name: aria-setsize
ariaProps.description: Defines the number of items in the current set of listitems or treeitems. Not required if all elements in the set are present in the DOM.

ariaProps.name: aria-sort
ariaProps.description: Indicates if items in a table or grid are sorted in ascending or descending order.

ariaProps.name: aria-valuemax
ariaProps.description: Defines the maximum allowed value for a range widget.

ariaProps.name: aria-valuemin
ariaProps.description: Defines the minimum allowed value for a range widget.

ariaProps.name: aria-valuenow
ariaProps.description: Defines the current value for a range widget.

ariaProps.name: aria-valuetext
ariaProps.description: Defines the human readable text alternative of aria-valuenow for a range widget.

domProps.name: inputMode
domProps.description: Hints at the type of data that might be entered by the user while editing the element or its contents

domProps.name: is
domProps.description: Specify that a standard HTML element should behave like a defined custom built-in element

domProps.type: ((instance: HTMLDivElement | null) => void) | RefObject<HTMLDivElement> | null | undefined
